title: Purely Optimised
description: A optimisation pack that gives a multitude of features along with better performance than vanilla
body:
An always evolving optimization modpack built to increase game smoothness while also giving QoL features. 

Purely Optimised is not quite a pure optimisation mod
-

I created this pack to use on my computer, trying to get usable frames while recording. It expanded from there.

- Need a map? We have Xaero's map and minimap.
- Want your game to look brilliant? Continuity and Iris ensure that you will experience the best views you can get, and bobby means that you can see much farther than you normally could on a server.
- Playing on a server with prox chat? Purely has simple prox chat installed already, so you can easily join in with the fun. *Assuming the server uses simple prox chat*
- Running on a slow computer? This pack was made for that. While it may be slower than some other packs out there, it at least doubles frames while in incredibly laggy situations.
- Creating content? Purely comes by default with Replay Mod, allowing you to save and easier create videos.
  - Replay mod records by default, and will ask if you want to save after the session. This can be changed in the configs.

_Note: The preset config of Litematica uses Numpad keys. If you do not have a 100% keyboard you will need to change the configs for this mod, or delete the preset from YOSBR before first launch_
